subtitles.original: 正しさだけ纏える術があれば
subtitles.english: If only there were a way to clothe myself only in righteousness...

subtitles.original: 少しは救われるだろうか？
subtitles.english: would I be saved even just a little?

subtitles.original: その瞳へと問いかける
subtitles.english: I ask those eyes of yours.

subtitles.original: 護るべきを捨てるべきと誰にかどわかされても
subtitles.english: Even if someone tricks you into abandoning what you must protect,

subtitles.original: 心通わないなら
subtitles.english: if our hearts do not connect,

subtitles.original: それは虚言だ
subtitles.english: then it is all a lie.

subtitles.original: 何も
subtitles.english: Without...

subtitles.original: 捨てずに
subtitles.english: discarding...

subtitles.original: 抗う
subtitles.english: anything...

subtitles.original: 力なき亡者
subtitles.english: a powerless soul...

subtitles.original: その覚悟無き創造に
subtitles.english: In a creation without resolve,

subtitles.original: 正しさなどない
subtitles.english: there is no righteousness.

subtitles.original: 失えば失うほどに更に気高く
subtitles.english: The more I lose, the more noble I become.

subtitles.original: その意志で世界を恨め
subtitles.english: Resent the world with that will of yours.

subtitles.original: 心が軋んで何度引き裂かれようと抗え
subtitles.english: Even if your heart creaks and is torn apart countless times, resist!

subtitles.original: か弱き一人を守り抜くための
subtitles.english: To fully protect a single, fragile person,

subtitles.original: この手の平がどれだけ汚れてしまっても
subtitles.english: no matter how dirty these hands of mine become,

subtitles.original: 構わないさ君が笑うなら
subtitles.english: I do not care, as long as you smile.

subtitles.original: 僕は何にでもなる
subtitles.english: I will become anything.

subtitles.original: 浅ましい擬態 へつらうだけなら
subtitles.english: A wretched mimicry, if all we do is fawn,

subtitles.original: 人も獣も何一つ変わらない
subtitles.english: then humans and beasts are not different at all.

subtitles.original: 鎖に似た自由を
subtitles.english: A freedom that resembles chains...

subtitles.original: 嘆いてはいびつに愛でるのでしょう
subtitles.english: we probably lament it while cherishing it in a twisted way.

subtitles.original: どうか君だけは
subtitles.english: Please, at least you...

subtitles.original: 僕を覚えていて欲しい
subtitles.english: I want you to remember me.

subtitles.original: 必ず君を自由へと誘う
subtitles.english: I will surely lead you to freedom.

subtitles.original: 俯けば俯くほどに更に気高く
subtitles.english: The more you look down, the more noble you become.

subtitles.original: その意志で世界を揺らせ
subtitles.english: Shake the world with that will of yours.

subtitles.original: 心が歪んで何もかもが崩れても抗え
subtitles.english: Even if your heart is distorted and everything collapses, resist!

subtitles.original: か弱き一人を守り抜くための
subtitles.english: To fully protect a single, fragile person,

subtitles.original: この手の平がどれだけ汚れてしまっても
subtitles.english: no matter how dirty these hands of mine become,

subtitles.original: 構わないさ君が笑うなら
subtitles.english: I do not care, as long as you smile.

subtitles.original: 何度だって壊してみせる
subtitles.english: I will break it down as many times as it takes.

subtitles.original: 心から君が笑えた時
subtitles.english: When you can smile from the bottom of your heart,

subtitles.original: 僕は報われるのだろう
subtitles.english: that is when I will finally be saved.
[On-screen Text: 2026]
[On-screen Text: 12.16]

subtitles.original: 不安も、
subtitles.english: Anxiety,

subtitles.original: 否定も、
subtitles.english: denial,

subtitles.original: 葛藤も。
subtitles.english: and conflict too.

subtitles.original: 私が歌で「反逆」する。
subtitles.english: I will "rebel" with my song.

subtitles.original: 1st Live 開催決定
subtitles.english: 1st Live confirmed!

subtitles.original: venue Kanadevia Hall
subtitles.english: venue: Kanadevia Hall

subtitles.original: REBELLION Takane Lui 1st Live
subtitles.english: REBELLION: Takane Lui 1st Live

subtitles.original: ここから始まる。私だけの物語。
subtitles.english: It begins here. My own story.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで！
subtitles.english: All right! With that...

subtitles.original: 私、鷹嶺ルイの初めてのソロライブが決定しました！
subtitles.english: My, Takane Lui's very first solo live concert has been confirmed!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: ということで、日程は半年後になる...なるのですが、
subtitles.english: So, the date is half a year from now... but,

subtitles.original: 半年後の2026年12月16日水曜日となっております！
subtitles.english: it will be on Wednesday, December 16, 2026!
